Off Calendar Jun-27-2022 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Jun-20-2022 Continued To Jun-27-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Dec-21-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Charles Drexler, Esq., counsel for Jackie Jenkins, Petitioner (appearing by telephone).

The Court notes that this matter was originally continued to this date to allow an objector, Alvin Jenkins, to file written objections. The Court further notes that no such objections have been filed and that Mr. Jenkins is not present in Court. Mr. Drexler confirms that he has not received any objections. The Court grants the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The Will dated July 7, 2011 is admitted to probate. Jackie Jenkins is appointed the Executor of the estate with full authority under the Independent Administration of Estates Act. Bond is waived. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for hearing on June 20, 2022 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. Reporter: Not Reported. (D204)

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Nov-23-2020 Continued To Dec-21-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Alvin Lerome Jenkins in propria persona.
No other appearances.

Matter is called for admitting of will date dated July 7, 2011. Mr. Jenkins stated he is objecting this petition.

The petition for probate of will and for letters testamentary is continued to December 21, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Mr. Jenkins to file and serve his written objections by December 14, 2020.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: S. Le. Probate Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
